title: ochrosia iwasakiana
intro: Ochrosia iwasakiana, also known as Japanese moon tree or Japanese moon orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Ochrosia iwasakiana are used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
